title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Intel India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Intel India
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!
